basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer, Dental Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Nursing Assistant, DEO/Clerk, Driver, Female Attendant
basic_details.job_type: Contractual (1 year, renewable for 1 additional year for ESM / till max age)
basic_details.short_information: The table below summarizes the key details of the ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 employment notice.

important_dates.interview_date: Through mobile/email to shortlisted candidates only

application_fee.details: The official ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 notice does not mention any application fee. Since this information is not officially stated, candidates should treat the application process as free unless updated details are issued by ECHS Cell, Stn HQ Pulgaon.

age_limit.details: Candidates selected as Medical Officer or Dental Officer will be required to complete 10 days of unpaid "On the Job Training" before signing the contract.

qualification.details: Eligibility for ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 depends on the specific post applied for. Below are the detailed educational qualification and age limit requirements for each position.

salary_details.details: Remuneration for ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 differs for Ex-Servicemen (ESM)/Retired Government Employees and Civilian candidates.

selection_process: The selection process for ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 involves the following steps:
Screening of applications based on eligibility criteria. Shortlisting of candidates

who will be intimated through mobile or email. Personal interview at Station Headquarters Pulgaon on the date and time communicated to shortlisted candidates. Final selection and result declaration on www.echs.gov.in.
No TA/DA (Travelling Allowance/Dearness Allowance) will be paid to candidates attending the interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates must follow these steps to apply for ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026:
Download the official "ECHS Application Form" from www.echs.gov.in.
Fill in the application form as per the prescribed format.
Attach self-attested photocopies of testimonials supporting educational qualifications, work experience, Aadhaar, and PAN.
Send the completed application to: OIC, Stn HQ (ECHS Cell), CAD Pulgaon, Teh - Deoli, Distt - Wardha, Pin - 442303.
If applying for more than one vacancy, submit a separate application for each post.
Ensure the application reaches the office before 1200 hrs on 10 August 2026.
Note: Applications sent by email will not be accepted under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 Recruitment Notification
content_sections.text: ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 offers a good opportunity for eligible Medical, Para Medical, and Non-Medical professionals, especially Ex-Servicemen, to join ECHS Polyclinics in Akola, Amravati, and Wardha on a contractual basis. Download ECHS Recruitment 2026 Recruitment Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 Recruitment Overview
content_sections.text: The table below summarizes the key details of the ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 employment notice.

rows.details: Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Nursing Assistant, DEO/Clerk, Driver, Female Attendant
Contractual (1 year, renewable for 1 additional year for ESM / till max age)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates ECHS Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 should keep the following date in mind. The official notice does not mention a separate application start date. Candidates should apply as early as possible before the deadline.

rows.event: Last date of receipt of application

rows.date: Through mobile/email to shortlisted candidates only

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 has a total of 9 vacancies distributed across Akola, Amravati, and Wardha polyclinics as shown below.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Eligibility for ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 depends on the specific post applied for. Below are the detailed educational qualification and age limit requirements for each position.

rows.minimum_qualification: MBBS with minimum 3 years' experience after internship. Additional qualification in Medicine/Surgery preferred.
B.Pharma / Diploma in Pharmacy with minimum 3 years' experience.
B.Sc Nursing / GNM / Class-I Nursing Assistants Course (Armed Forces) with minimum 5 years' experience.
Graduate / Class-I Clerical Trade (Armed Forces) with minimum 5 years' experience.
Class 8th pass, Class-I MT Driver (Armed Forces), valid civil driving licence, minimum 5 years' experience.
Literate, with minimum 5 years' experience in Civil/Army Health Institutions.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit ECHS Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates selected as Medical Officer or Dental Officer will be required to complete 10 days of unpaid "On the Job Training" before signing the contract.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 Salary / Remuneration
content_sections.text: Remuneration for ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 differs for Ex-Servicemen (ESM)/Retired Government Employees and Civilian candidates.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 notice does not mention any application fee. Since this information is not officially stated, candidates should treat the application process as free unless updated details are issued by ECHS Cell, Stn HQ Pulgaon.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection process for ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 involves the following steps: Screening of applications based on eligibility criteria. Shortlisting of candidates, who will be intimated through mobile or email. Personal interview at Station Headquarters Pulgaon on the date and time communicated to shortlisted candidates. Final selection and result declaration on www.echs.gov.in. No TA/DA (Travelling Allowance/Dearness Allowance) will be paid to candidates attending the interview.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 Required Documents
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates must carry the following original documents at the time of the interview: 10th/Matric certificate and mark sheet 10+2 certificate and mark sheet Graduation/Post-graduation/Diploma/Course certificates as applicable Work experience certificates Aadhaar card PAN card Discharge book (for Ex-Servicemen) PPO (Pension Payment Order), if applicable Service records Two passport-size colour photographs Self-attested photocopies of educational qualifications, work experience, Aadhaar, and PAN must also be attached along with the application form.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply ECHS Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must follow these steps to apply for ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026: Download the official "ECHS Application Form" from www.echs.gov.in. Fill in the application form as per the prescribed format. Attach self-attested photocopies of testimonials supporting educational qualifications, work experience, Aadhaar, and PAN. Send the completed application to: OIC, Stn HQ (ECHS Cell), CAD Pulgaon, Teh - Deoli, Distt - Wardha, Pin - 442303. If applying for more than one vacancy, submit a separate application for each post. Ensure the application reaches the office before 1200 hrs on 10 August 2026. Note: Applications sent by email will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q1. What is ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026 is an employment notice released by ECHS Cell, Stn HQ Pulgaon to hire Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Nursing Assistant, DEO/Clerk, Driver, and Female Attendant on a contractual basis for ECHS Polyclinics in Akola, Amravati, and Wardha.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications is 10 August 2026 by 1200 hrs. Applications received after this deadline will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for the ECHS Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Civilian candidates selected as Medical Officer will receive Rs. 95,000/- per month. Ex-Servicemen/Retired Government Employees will receive a fixed remuneration calculated by deducting their basic pension from their last drawn pay, or the civilian rate, whichever is higher.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for ECHS Cell Pulgaon jobs?
faq.answer: Candidates must download the ECHS Application Form from www.echs.gov.in, fill it out, attach the required self-attested documents, and send it by post to OIC, Stn HQ (ECHS Cell), CAD Pulgaon, Teh - Deoli, Distt - Wardha, Pin - 442303. Email applications are not accepted.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for ECHS contractual posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age for contract varies by post: 66 years for Medical Officer, 63 years for Dental Officer, 56 years for Pharmacist and Nursing Assistant, and 53 years for DEO/Clerk, Driver, and Female Attendant.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for ECHS Pulgaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notice does not specify any application fee. This information is currently unavailable in the notification.
